news.title: SaverOne Enters the Military UAV Market:  Signs Term Sheet to Acquire 33.3% of Gryphen Aircraft Industries, with an Option to Increase to 53% at a €30 Million Valuation
SaverOne and VisionWave Complete Their Strategic Transaction to Advance an RF Defense Platform
SaverOne Signs Pilot Agreement with RBtec to Expand its RF Sensing Technology into the Security Market
